text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 143 

SPLMTL_ENRLMT 

LABEL: Annual Provider Record in Supplemental Enrollment File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is one or more record(s) in the provider enrollment supplemental file for 
this provider (linking from provider base to provider enrollment file via the CCW_APR_LINK_KEY). 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_ENRLMT 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_ENRLMT 

TYPE: CHAR
